'''Gaios''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] within the grid coordinates K-9. Its philosophers' statement "a seed does not know the flower that produced it," was well known.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1stm}}
